top_risks: Critical: Unsupported Operating System Detected (On-Prem Infrastructure (Nessus))
Critical: Unsupported Operating System Detected (On-Prem Infrastructure (Nessus))
Critical: Unsupported Operating System Detected (On-Prem Infrastructure (Nessus))
summary.summary: The scan identified AWS configuration issues that increase exposure to data loss, unauthorized access, and audit findings. Priority should be given to internet-exposed resources, weak IAM controls, and logging gaps.

top_findings.risk_description: Unsupported operating systems no longer receive security patches and carry elevated exploit risk.
top_findings.recommendation: Migrate unsupported operating systems to supported versions.
remediation_steps: Identify business owners for unsupported assets.
Plan and execute upgrade or replacement to supported OS baselines.
Isolate legacy systems until migration is completed.

top_findings.risk_description: Unsupported operating systems no longer receive security patches and carry elevated exploit risk.
top_findings.recommendation: Migrate unsupported operating systems to supported versions.
remediation_steps: Identify business owners for unsupported assets.
Plan and execute upgrade or replacement to supported OS baselines.
Isolate legacy systems until migration is completed.

top_findings.risk_description: Unsupported operating systems no longer receive security patches and carry elevated exploit risk.
top_findings.recommendation: Migrate unsupported operating systems to supported versions.
remediation_steps: Identify business owners for unsupported assets.
Plan and execute upgrade or replacement to supported OS baselines.
Isolate legacy systems until migration is completed.

top_findings.risk_description: Unsupported operating systems no longer receive security patches and carry elevated exploit risk.
top_findings.recommendation: Migrate unsupported operating systems to supported versions.
remediation_steps: Identify business owners for unsupported assets.
Plan and execute upgrade or replacement to supported OS baselines.
Isolate legacy systems until migration is completed.

top_findings.risk_description: Disabling host firewall protections exposes services broadly and weakens segmentation controls.
top_findings.recommendation: Enable host-based firewalls and enforce baseline inbound rules.
remediation_steps: Enable Windows Defender Firewall (or equivalent) on affected hosts.
Apply baseline allow-list policy for required management and app ports.
Block unsolicited inbound traffic by default.

findings.risk_description: SMB relay attacks become more feasible when SMB signing is disabled.
findings.recommendation: Enforce SMB signing on all on-prem Windows servers.
remediation_steps: Apply Group Policy to require SMB signing for clients and servers.
Validate policy application on critical hosts.
Rescan to confirm SMB relay exposure is removed.

findings.risk_description: RDP endpoints without NLA are more susceptible to credential theft and brute-force attacks.
findings.recommendation: Require Network Level Authentication (NLA) for all RDP endpoints.
remediation_steps: Enable NLA in Windows remote access settings or via Group Policy.
Restrict RDP access paths to approved management networks.
Retest remote logon behavior after hardening.

findings.risk_description: Disabling host firewall protections exposes services broadly and weakens segmentation controls.
findings.recommendation: Enable host-based firewalls and enforce baseline inbound rules.
remediation_steps: Enable Windows Defender Firewall (or equivalent) on affected hosts.
Apply baseline allow-list policy for required management and app ports.
Block unsolicited inbound traffic by default.

findings.risk_description: Static local admin credentials can be reused laterally after compromise.
findings.recommendation: Implement local administrator password rotation (for example via Microsoft LAPS).
remediation_steps: Deploy LAPS (or equivalent) for local administrator credential rotation.
Require unique host-level local admin passwords.
Audit privileged local account usage and stale accounts.

findings.risk_description: Unsupported operating systems no longer receive security patches and carry elevated exploit risk.
findings.recommendation: Migrate unsupported operating systems to supported versions.
remediation_steps: Identify business owners for unsupported assets.
Plan and execute upgrade or replacement to supported OS baselines.
Isolate legacy systems until migration is completed.

findings.risk_description: Delayed patching increases exposure windows for known exploited vulnerabilities.
findings.recommendation: Apply overdue security patches within the defined remediation SLA.
remediation_steps: Prioritize internet-exposed and privileged systems first.
Patch and reboot assets through approved maintenance windows.
Rescan to verify missing critical patches are remediated.
